title: Welcome to NextEditor
markdown:
| one town| Column 2 | Column 3 |
|----------|----------|----------|
| Cell 1   | Cell 2   | Cell 3   |
| Cell 4   | Cell 5   | Cell 6   |

# Welcome to ***NextEditor***!

This is a live preview of your visual markdown page. You can click on components on the right to edit their text inline, drag them to rearrange their order, or click buttons on the toolbar to add new components.

## Custom Features
